instruction: Move one of the pear items to the indicated sofa.
Find a orange on the TV stand and move it to the sink.
Take an pear and transfer it to the allocated left counter.
Find a orange and move it to the right counter.
On the right counter, I need a toy airplane and a orange.
I left the fridge open. Can you help?
On the TV stand I need you to put a plate.
Detach the strawberry from the right counter.
Bring a banana and a can to the left counter.

Find a toy airplane and move it to the right counter.
Hey, on the sink, I accidentally left my plate, can you bring it to the right counter?
I need a book on the TV stand. Can you help?

On the left counter, remove the lego.

Put both an rubriks cube and a lid onto the left counter.
Displace the spatula from the sink.
Find a wrench and move it to the left counter.
